arts.ttl: One winner and four losers from Chelsea vs Brighton, including attacker with zero shots in 90 minutes - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea are out of this season’s FA Cup tournament after last night’s extremely poor defeat away to Brighton. The Blues were eliminated by Premier League...

arts.ttl: Chelsea's 66 days that changed everything, brutal Nkunku verdict and January costs Maresca - Bobby Vincent - football.london
arts.sum: A lack of goal scoring prowess has cost Chelsea in that period and an overreliance on Nicolas Jackson, still only 23-years-old, has seen a huge dip in form from the Senegalese striker - who incidentally, missed the defeat at the Amex Stadium due to a muscular injury. Guiu's injury is thought to be a long-term one and Jackson's minor but either way, Chelsea were left extremely short of options on Saturday night in Brighton.

arts.ttl: 'Difficult to think': Enzo Maresca makes claim about Joao Felix straight after Chelsea's defeat to Brighton
arts.sum: Chelsea crashed out of the FA Cup last night with an unconvincing display that led to a 2-1 defeat to Brighton at the Amex stadium....

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news: Enzo Maresca provides Nicolas Jackson injury update as Champions League race intensifies
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca provides an update on striker Nicolas Jackson, who was unavailable for his side's FA Cup clash against Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca sends brutal parting shot to Joao Felix after his deadline day Chelsea departure to AC Milan
arts.sum: Felix joined Milan on loan for the remainder of the season on deadline day of the January transfer window and scored on his debut as the Italian giants beat Roma 3-1 in the Coppa Italia.

arts.ttl: Maresca bemoans Chelsea’s inability to hold onto lead
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca admitted Chelsea’s FA Cup exit underlined how much they need to improve if they are to challenge the Premier League big guns again. Brighton came from behind to beat the Blues 2-1 and secure a place in the fifth round. For head coach Maresca, it was an example of a match a top […] The post Maresca bemoans Chelsea’s inability to hold onto lead appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Reece James absence vs Brighton explained as Enzo Maresca confirms Chelsea plan
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has confirmed the reason behind Reece James' absence from the Chelsea matchday squad in the FA Cup defeat to Brighton. There was some concern on Saturday night after James was not included in the Chelsea squad that travelled to Brighton for FA Cup tie.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea FA Cup defeat, Nicolas Jackson blow, Reece James absence
arts.sum: "Yeah, sometimes I think you need to play games without players to realise how important they are. "For sure, I've said to the players weeks ago and tonight, in terms of the team, we need to learn how to win sometimes 1-0.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca dreams of 1-0 victories after Chelsea bow out of FA Cup at Brighton
arts.sum: The Blues led but were beaten 2-1 by the Seagulls in the fourth round tie on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca says Chelsea discovered undroppable star during Brighton FA Cup defeat
arts.sum: Chelsea suffered a 2-1 defeat to Brighton in the FA Cup fourth round, with Enzo Maresca starting Christopher Nkunku up front instead of injured striker Nicolas Jackson
